payload.answer: I could not remember the article because the URL fetch failed with a 404/network error. No article claims were stored.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content could not be fetched due to a 404/network error, so no durable source claims can be extracted.

details: No durable memory was created from unavailable article content.
User-stated reason noted only in the current request: useful for memory architecture.

repair_options: Ask to remember only the URL and your stated reason, without article content.
